articles.title: Truecaller slashes 70 jobs amid declining ad sales
articles.description: Truecaller's ad revenue declined by 44%, leading to the layoffs.

articles.title: Live only at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026: Why most founders are already behind on raising a Series A in 2027
articles.description: Learn what it takes to build a Series A in 2027 from top VCs at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, taking place at San Francisco’s Moscone West on October 13-15. Register today to hear this session live on the Builders Stage.

articles.title: Lime, the Uber-backed micromobility company, files for IPO
articles.description: After years of hints and preparation, Lime plans to enter the public markets.

articles.title: The biggest U.S. power grid is under strain from AI — and no one is happy
articles.description: PJM Interconnection — which oversees the grid for some of the densest data center developments on Earth — wants to overhaul itself. Not everyone thinks it's up to the task.

articles.title: Airbnb says AI now writes 60% of its new code
articles.description: Airbnb also said its customer support AI bot now handles 40% of issues without escalating to a human agent.

articles.title: The fax machine is the bottleneck in U.S. healthcare, and VCs are starting to notice
articles.description: Like many AI companies automating work that humans currently do, Basata will eventually face a harder question about where the line is between augmenting workers and displacing them. For now, the founders say the administrative staff they work with aren't worried about that; they're more worried about drowning.

articles.title: Ramp in talks to hit $40B+ valuation, 6 months after reaching $32B
articles.description: The company is reportedly in talks to raise another $750 million at a pre-money valuation of more than $40 billion. It last raised in November at $32 billion.

articles.title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
articles.description: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.

articles.title: Hackers deface school login pages after claiming another Instructure hack

articles.title: Bumble is getting rid of the swipe, CEO says
articles.description: Based on Whitney Wolfe Herd's past comments about Bumble's new direction, the company is expected to lean into AI -- Bumble is even working on an AI dating assistant called Bee, and the CEO has made many comments over the years about how AI will be "a supercharger to love and relationships."

articles.title: Tome, another Goodreads book-tracker rival, shuts down
articles.description: Built on the back of the sizable and influential BookTok community -- creators who discuss and review books on TikTok -- the app offered readers a place to chronicle and rate their books, get recommendations, and even add photos of things like favorite quotes or memes, or share playlists that match the book's vibes.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **企业动态与裁员**：Truecaller因广告销售下滑裁员70人；Ramp估值6个月内从320亿美元升至400亿美元以上；Gusto营收达10亿美元，接近上市。
2. **AI技术应用与进展**：Airbnb称AI已编写其60%的新代码；OpenAI推出API语音智能功能及“可信联系人”安全机制；Voi创始人新AI创企Pit成为斯德哥尔摩新星。
3. **资本市场与IPO**：Lime（优步支持的微出行公司）提交IPO申请；Kodiak AI融资1亿美元但估值大幅折扣致股价暴跌37%。
4. **行业挑战与安全事件**：美国最大电网因AI需求承压引不满；传真机成美国医疗瓶颈，VC开始关注；黑客篡改学校登录页面，声称再次入侵Instructure。
5. **企业战略与产品**：迪士尼据报计划打造统一“超级应用”；OpenAI推出预防自伤的“可信联系人”保护措施。

今日最值得关注的发展：AI正深度渗透企业运营（Airbnb代码60%由AI生成）与基础设施（电网承压），同时资本市场对AI公司估值分化加剧（Lime冲刺IPO vs. Kodiak AI股价暴跌）。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **医疗AI与硬件去CUDA化**：MedQA模型在AMD ROCm平台上完成微调，无需依赖NVIDIA CUDA，展现开源硬件生态的进展。
2. **AI广告与创意应用**：Google发布AI辅助小企业广告创作案例，并推出AI搜索园艺建议功能；同时联合XPRIZE发起350万美元未来视觉电影竞赛。
3. **语音智能与安全功能升级**：OpenAI推出API新语音模型、ChatGPT新增可信联系人功能、测试广告植入，并发布GPT-5.5网络安全版以强化可信访问。
4. **开发者工具与效率优化**：Gemini API引入Webhooks减少长任务延迟；OpenAI的Codex被用于重新定义软件开发流程。
5. **强化学习与基准测试规范**：vLLM从V0到V1强调强化学习中正确性优先；Open ASR排行榜添加反作弊机制以提升评测公信力。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：OpenAI集中发布语音模型升级、安全功能与广告测试，标志其正加速将AI嵌入消费场景与商业生态。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **历史与正义**：环球时报报道，东京审判揭露了靖国神社歪曲历史叙事的本质，强调国际社会对二战历史真相的坚守。  
2. **科技突破**：中国发布首台双核原子量子计算机“汉原二号”，标志着在量子计算领域取得重大自主创新进展。  
3. **中美博弈**：中美双方正寻求建立“护栏”机制，防止人工智能领域的竞争升级为危机；同时，荷兰情报机构指出中国网络能力已与美国相当。  
4. **经济动态**：三星因市场份额萎缩拟退出中国家电销售，福特正就出售部分欧洲工厂与中国吉利进行“非常深入”的谈判，显示全球产业格局调整。  
5. **青年与社会**：中国年轻人正摒弃“内卷”式竞争，追求更平衡的生活与职业选择，反映社会价值观的积极转变。  

**总结**：今日最值得关注的是中国在量子计算领域的里程碑式突破，以及中美在人工智能与网络安全领域既竞争又寻求管控的复杂互动。
